Friend,

Thank you for your outpouring of support during Hurricane Matthew.

**For all of those impacted by this storm no matter how large or small, we are sending all of our prayers and support to them.**

I have spent the past five days doing everything I can to monitor this storm and make sure our state has the necessary resources; I have to be honest with you - I have limited my campaign activity because that was not important at all in comparison.

But, Friend, here's the reality. The future of our country rests on the outcome of this election in Florida. In order to stay fighting for Floridians and all Americans, I need to win re-election on November 8th; and I can't do that without your support today.

**We are now less than one month away from Election Day, and we coming up short on our final Get-Out-The-Vote budgets. We need to raise $500,000 by October 15th to be able to successfully finish this campaign with a strong victory.**

Patrick

The future of our country rests on the outcome of this election in Florida.
| [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/38058550:WTZOJSbgN:m:1:1405944196:01EA356D31B484D90924FBDF769C2DDE:r)

Friend,

Thank you for your outpouring of support during Hurricane Matthew.

**For all of those impacted by this storm no matter how large or small, we are sending all of our prayers and support to them.**

I have spent the past five days doing everything I can to monitor this storm and make sure our state has the necessary resources; I have to be honest with you - I have limited my campaign activity because that was not important at all in comparison.

But, Friend, here's the reality. The future of our country rests on the outcome of this election in Florida. In order to stay fighting for Floridians and all Americans, I need to win re-election on November 8th; and I can't do that without your support today.

**We are now less than one month away from Election Day, and we coming up short on our final Get-Out-The-Vote budgets. We need to raise $500,000 by October 15th to be able to successfully finish this campaign with a strong victory.**

Your donation will go instantly towards our television & radio advertising budgets as well as the costs for printing our final GOTV pamphlets. **If I can count on you to help us reach this critical goal, please let me know by making an instant online secure donation.**

---
Dear Peter,

This election season has left many Christians lost and confused. Most Christians desire to relate their faith to politics ... but simply don't know how. In this Forum, the panel will address the latest political issues facing our day. On [October 11th from 7 - 8:30PM (ET)](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/38059240:W0HoPSbNa:m:1:876315805:5AFE1E1B526FE3A34512725F71B9A5AE:r), My Faith Votes will be LIVE streaming, on our website, The Summit Church's panel discussion entitled "The Gospel and Politics."

"The Gospel and Politics" will feature Bruce Ashford, Provost and Professor of Theology & Culture at SEBTS, and Chris Pappalardo, Lead Researcher and Writer at the Summit. Bruce and Chris have recently published a helpful book on Christianity and politics, called One Nation Under God: A Christian Hope for American Politics. Bruce & Chris will be joined by Dr. Terrance Ruth, a speaker and educator in Public Affairs, and Kami Mueller, founder of the Mueller Group, a communications firm representing political clients, and led by Pastor J.D. Greear of The Summit Church, Durham, NC .

This panel will equip you to apply the gospel to politics, and to do so with both **grace** and **truth** , **courage** and **compassion**. For those of you who are into politics, you'll be challenged. For those of you who aren't into politics, you'll be encouraged. We won't tell you who to vote for (sorry), but we will put the tools you need into your hands. (You may want to look at Pastor Greear's blog post today in advance of the forum: [https://goo.gl/3P2Tuw](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/38059241:W0HoPSbNa:m:1:876315805:5AFE1E1B526FE3A34512725F71B9A5AE:r).)

In this home stretch for the election, we are bombarded with political messages from many sides. **This forum exists to show you how to engage in politics without losing your mind-or your soul.**

Make sure to clear your schedule Tuesday at 7PM (ET) / 4PM (PT) to watch this event live at [https://www.myfaithvotes.org/gospelandpoliticsforum/](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/38059240:W0HoPSbNa:m:1:876315805:5AFE1E1B526FE3A34512725F71B9A5AE:r).

| My Faith Votes exists to inspire and motivate Jesus followers to vote. We are a non-partisan movement of the Church in America.

body:

Friend,

Montanans begin voting **tomorrow**. Last week we learned that Greg Gianforte pumped in another $1.5 million into his campaign, bringing his total to $3.3 million in self-funding.

We don't have his millions. **[We're depending on grassroots donors like you. Will you chip in $15?](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=%2FDknRXTf%2BkFoNl99g1vaHzIVvG9BOEtq)**

There is so much at stake: equal pay, public access, tax policies that work for everyone (and not just the wealthiest Montanans), quality public schools, fiscal responsibility... the list goes on.

I'm proud to be on the ticket with Steve because he understands Montana values, and he is deeply committed to keeping our state great. [**A donation of $15 before voters begin casting ballots tomorrow would be a huge help.**](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=OE%2Fs5U59Nn4fBV863e7KijIVvG9BOEtq)

Thanks,
Mike Cooney ****

name: Rev. Henry F. Curtis, IV
subject: Rob's bill is helping save lives
body:
| Peter --

My name is Henry Curtis, and I am the pastor at the St. John African Methodist Episcopal Church in Cleveland’s Central Neighborhood. The congregation I serve works with many ex-offenders who are trying to get their lives back on track after serving time and exiting our criminal justice system.

Rob Portman's Second Chance Act helps breaks the cycle and stop the revolving door that we too often see in our prison system. Rob’s bill is helping save lives across Ohio and across our nation. It has brought over $19 million in grant funding to Ohio to help those transitioning from prison back into our communities get the job training, mental health treatment, and drug treatment to help get back on their feet. And it’s working. In the past 10 years, the recidivism rate in Ohio has dropped by 11%.

[](https://www.robportman.com/watch_second_chance?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=henry_blast&n=1)
I hope you’ll [click here](https://www.robportman.com/watch_second_chance?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=henry_blast&n=2) to learn more about Rob’s work in helping people in our communities get a second chance at life, and I hope you’ll join me in voting for Rob Portman on November 8th.
Sincerely,

Rev. Henry F. Curtis, IV [](https://www.robportman.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Frobportman&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=henry_blast&n=3)[](https://www.robportman.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Ftwitter.com%2Frobportman&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=henry_blast&n=4)[

](https://www.robportman.com/donate?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=henry_blast&n=5)
---

name: PETITIONS@russfeingold.com
subject: Call on Senator Johnson to un-endorse
disclaimer_text: paid for by Russ for Wisconsin, Joe Sensenbrenner, Madison, WI, Treasurer
body:
Nearly 50 Republican leaders have un-endorsed Donald Trump since Friday. | [](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf45f8/1c469400/139d18/357e263/2649030363/VEsH/ "http://action.russfeingold.com/page/s/unendorse?utm_source=ema_2016-10-10_unendorse&source=ema_2016-10-10_unendorse&utm_campaign=unendorse&utm_medium=ema") Friend, **Nearly fi fty Republican leaders have un-endorsed Donald Trump since Friday.** You know who's not on the list? _Wisconsin Senator Ron Johnson._ **[If you agree it's time for Senator Johnson to FINALLY put country before party and un-endorse Donald Trump, add your name.](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf45f8/1c469400/139d18/357e263/2649030363/VEsE/ "http://action.russfeingold.com/page/s/unendorse?utm_source=ema_2016-10-10_unendorse&source=ema_2016-10-10_unendorse&utm_campaign=unendorse&utm_medium=ema")** On Friday, the Washington Post published unedited audio of Donald Trump having a disgusting conversation about women, during which he openly joked about sexual assault. Trump's remarks are truly terrifying, and have shaken up this campaign. Senator Ron Johnson called Trump's words "indefensible." But he has not yet pulled his endorsement. **[Add your name right now if you agree: It's time for Senator Johnson to grow a backbone and publicly drop his support of Donald Trump.](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf45f8/1c469400/139d18/357e263/2649030363/VEsF/ "http://action.russfeingold.com/page/s/unendorse?utm_source=ema_2016-10-10_unendorse&source=ema_2016-10-10_unendorse&utm_campaign=unendorse&utm_medium=ema")** If Senator Johnson won't stand up to this racist, sexist, predatory, and hateful bully, how can we count on him to represent the families of Wisconsin in Washington? name: Mike Weinholtz
subject: The women of Utah deserve better
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Weinholtz for Governor
body:
| | By now I'm sure you've heard about last week's leaked video of Donald Trump confessing to sexual assault.
---
| | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/-9154379870782682368/6619113868537039616?am=&recipientId=ENzs9AKZ1wqBssNbEIT6L&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com) Dear Peter, By now I'm sure you've heard about last week's leaked video of Donald Trump confessing to sexual assault. Since then, a handful of Utah Republicans have come out saying they'll no longer vote for him, including Gov. Herbert. But did you notice what else the governor said about it? Nothing. After endorsing an unqualified racist, sexist narcissist for months, Gov. Herbert had nothing to say other than a single tweet: [](https://act.myngp.com/el/-9154379870782682368/6619113868537039616?am=&recipientId=ENzs9AKZ1wqBssNbEIT6L&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com) This is unacceptable. Rape culture is real, and the mistreatment of women deserves stronger condemnation than one tweet. Gov. Herbert's silence since last Friday speaks volumes. Gov. Herbert should never have endorsed Trump to begin with, but after last week's revelation he should have condemned his actions vocally and publicly, not just tweeted and retreated. [**Chip in $20 to elect a governor who will stand up for Utah women!**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-9154379870782682368/6619113868537039616?am=20&recipientId=ENzs9AKZ1wqBssNbEIT6L&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com) Unfortunately, this is consistent with Gov. Herbert's track record on women's issues: Despite the fact that 1 in 3 Utah women will experience sexual violence, Gov. Herbert has done essentially nothing about it in SEVEN years. He's failed the women of Utah at every turn, from his prejudiced and misguided efforts to defund Planned Parenthood, to his failure to even acknowledge the gender pay gap in Utah (women make 70 cents to the dollar in Utah, 9 cents even lower than the national average.) As governor, I intend to address sexual violence and the gender pay gap, advocate for more female representation in government, and fight against the mistreatment of women every single day. **[Donate $20 if you agree that the women of Utah deserve better!](https://act.myngp.com/el/-9154379870782682368/6619113868537039616?am=20&recipientId=ENzs9AKZ1wqBssNbEIT6L&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com)** Together with you,
Mike | Paid for by Mike Weinholtz for Governor

name: Dan Parker, Senior Adviser
subject: State of the race
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Evan Bayh Committee, 133 W
body:
| [ ](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a5052d/7be36b49/1e4d9c79/78f83cfb/2652532156/VEsH/ "http://www.evanbayhforindiana.com/")
---
Spoiler alert, Friend: This race is very close. And it's going to be that way until election night.

When we see nearly $15 million poured into ads by Congressman Young, the Kochs, and McConnell's henchmen, we expect a tight race. All this money goes toward distorting and lying about Evan's record. And too many hardworking Hoosiers don't have the time to fact check the garbage.

**That 's why we need every ounce of support from you the rest of the way. We need to execute our ambitious media plan and pay organizers across the state. [Don't let us fall short. Chip in $5 or whatever you can >>](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a5052d/7be36b49/1e4d9c79/78f83cfa/2652532156/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bayh-email?refcode=20161010nd&amount=10")**

This race has shaped up exactly how we expected, Friend.

Evan Bayh is out on the trail every day talking about making college more affordable for Hoosiers. Fighting to make sure our seniors can retire with dignity. Holding companies accountable for outsourcing our jobs.

Meanwhile, Congressman Young is winning the support of his special interest backers by doing what he's done his whole career. He's abandoned the middle class by calling Social Security a "Ponzi scheme" and saying the auto industry should have gone "belly up."

**Our campaign plan was designed with the belief that thousands of Hoosiers across the state would step up to support Evan.[Prove that we can beat an army of special interests by chipping in $5 to Evan's campaign today >>](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a5052d/7be36b49/1e4d9c79/78f83cfa/2652532156/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bayh-email?refcode=20161010nd&amount=10")**

We're going to win this thing, but only with your support.

Thanks for all you do,

Dan Parker

body:
|
Friend,

Can you imagine any other candidate saying or doing the kinds of things that Donald Trump has?

Mocking a disabled reporter, insulting a Gold Star military family, challenging the qualifications of a sitting judge due to his heritage -- all things Donald Trump has done while Chris's opponent has continued to support him.

In fact, when Macy's announced that they would stop selling Trump products after the Republican nominee called Mexican immigrants rapists and murderers, our opponent posted a photo of herself cutting up her Macy's card to protest "Trump bashing" by the retail store!

Even after the latest vulgar Trump comments about assaulting women, Chris's Republican opponent has not withdrawn her support for her party's nominee.

[**Please add your name and tell our Republican opponent it 's time to stand with country over party and withdraw her endorsement of Donald Trump.**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91ab6/70cdc2ba/47201d58/397a61b/3967803426/VEsH/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/tell-the-gop-to-denounce-trump?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+FIRSTNAMEPlease+add+your+name+and+tell+o&utm_campaign=em101016_1&source=em101016_1") [ADD YOUR NAME](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91ab6/70cdc2ba/47201d58/397a618/3967803426/VEsE/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/tell-the-gop-to-denounce-trump?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME&utm_campaign=em101016_1&source=em101016_1") The outcome of this election will have lasting impact, friend. body:
| [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c090e/24c69fd9/11496d2e/18eb77fb/4207543586/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WPEFEV17N_digital_email_20161010_CampaignStories_n-all&source=WPEFEV17N_digital_email_20161010_CampaignStories_n-all")
---

| | Hi there,

Campaigns have no time for procrastination.

Recruiting volunteers to get out the vote, cutting ads, and putting together mail pieces can't be done in the last few days of an election. By then, it's too late. For our candidates, that work is being done _right now_.

Right now Emily Cain in Maine's Second Congressional District is strategizing to break through in the battle of the airwaves -- over $9 million is being spent on TV ads in her race (yes, in a House race!). And Deborah Ross in North Carolina is making plans to push back on the $9 million a Mitch McConnell-affiliated super PAC is dropping into her top-tier Senate race.

A campaign that doesn't have the resources to respond to a changing race sinks, and it sinks fast. I've seen it happen, and it is heartbreaking when it's a candidate you deeply believe in.

**[But that heartbreak is 100% preventable-- and we prevent it by increasing our support for our candidates right here, right now. Donate $3 to make sure they can handle whatever comes their way in the next 29 days.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c090e/24c69fd9/11496d2e/18eb77f4/4207543586/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20161010_email_Campaign?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+But+that+heartbreak+is+100+preventable+m&utm_campaign=WPEFEV17N_digital_email_20161010_CampaignStories_n-all&source=WPEFEV17N_digital_email_20161010_CampaignStories_n-all")**

When campaigns have the resources to make last minute adjustments, it makes all the difference. Here's an example:

In 2012, Tammy Baldwin's opponent was a popular former governor. For months, polls showed him in the lead. And then, in mid-September, Tammy started to pull ahead. Soon it was Tammy ahead in the polls and her opponent falling behind.

Nearly three million votes and $65 million later (some of it from this community), Tammy made history as the first openly gay person elected to the Senate.

This point in the cycle is when races have their final shifts -- either in favor of our women or their Republican opponents. The support we send candidates today builds leads that become victories on election night.

**Donate $3 right now so our candidates can be ready to respond to however their races change in these last 29 days:**

Thanks,

Jess O'Connell

name: Carole King
subject: The real deal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
I'm proud to be standing with Jay Inslee. | Dear Friend, Four years ago, I said Jay Inslee was the real deal. I had seen Jay in action, fighting to stand up for working families and to protect our environment. I knew if Jay was elected governor of Washington, he'd bring that same deep-rooted commitment to Olympia. Washingtonians knew it too. That's why they elected him. Four years later, I'm proud to say that when it comes to building a sustainable future, Jay Inslee is one of the most important leaders in a generation. In addition to writing songs and a book, I've been involved in politics and environmental activism for a long time. And I can tell you that progressive activists look to Jay as a national leader in building a clean energy economy. I endorsed Jay for governor in 2012, and I'm honored to be standing with him in 2016 as he runs for reelection. [**Will you join me and support Jay 's campaign with a $25 contribution today?**](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=OTY2MzgwMwS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTAyMDc2OTE3NgS2&mt=1&rt=0) On tour, I travel the country, and I can attest that Jay is a one-of-a-kind governor. His ability to bring people together in Washington, and globally, to create a sustainable future is second to none. Simply put, he's a progressive leader that we can all be proud of. Jay's doing what he promised four years ago: Working to create a sustainable future by building an economy that is putting Washingtonians back to work. Throughout his career in public service, Jay has fought for middle-class Washingtonians. He's running for reelection because he wants to continue the fight. With environmental action in Washington, D.C. roadblocked at every turn by climate change-denying Republicans, Jay's work as governor of Washington has become a beacon of hope for Americans who know we need action now! So, come this November, it matters not only that Jay wins, but how he wins. I'm committed to supporting Jay so he can win by mobilizing communities across the state toward a common, progressive vision. [**Please join me and contribute $25 to Jay 's campaign today.**](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=OTY2MzgwMwS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTAyMDc2OTE3NgS2&mt=1&rt=0) _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [EXPRESS DONATE $10 »](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=23&ms=OTY2MzgwMwS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTAyMDc2OTE3NgS2&mt=2&rj=MTAyMDc2OTE3NgS2&rt=0)

**[Or, donate another amount.](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=19&ms=OTY2MzgwMwS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTAyMDc2OTE3NgS2&mt=2&rj=MTAyMDc2OTE3NgS2&rt=0)**
In this crazy and volatile election year, well-funded anti-environmental special interests are throwing millions of dollars into races around the country. They're determined to advance their climate-denying agenda at every political level. We can't afford to be complacent. We can't afford to let anti-environmental interests buy this or any other election.
Jay Inslee has proven that he's worthy of your support, and that's why he still has mine. I hope you'll join me in showing your support by giving whatever you can to help re-elect Governor Inslee. Please also volunteer if you can. Your involvement could make all the difference.
Thank you so much.
\-- Carole

Friend,

"'I'm not playing this game with you,' he [Greg Gianforte] told a reporter and members of the _Missoulian_ editorial board on Thursday, pounding the table in response to persistent questioning about the details of his position."
\-- _Missoulian_ 10/8/16

Pounding the table? Lashing out when simply being asked to clarify the specifics of his proposals? **If you agree this isn't the kind of behavior we want in our governor,[will you donate $15?](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=92gvq9BHH4AXZf5rTzEINMtq%2BVbuWoaN)**

It's insulting. I wish I could say it's not going to work but he has outspent us by more than 4:1 on TV and this is coming down to the wire. Voting begins tomorrow. [**Will you pitch in $15?**](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=hXwxs26A89n%2BArSUPkRqJE07qPyFrTiv)

Team Bullock ****
